mapper.sql: id, store_id, `name`, pricing_method, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert:
insert into freight_template
id,
store_id,
`name`,
pricing_method,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{pricingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update freight_template
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pricing_method = #{pricingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update freight_template set store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pricing_method = #{pricingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into freight_template (id, store_id, `name`, pricing_method, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pricingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into freight_template (id, store_id, `name`, pricing_method, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pricingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}) on duplicate key update id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pricing_method = #{pricingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}
